title: Make Link Title Optional, Default Field Link Value
excerpt:

posts.author: colinbowern-octopus (Colin Bowern)
posts.cookedHtml:
I use a Link column for more information on my item. I have the link on my clipboard and when I add “From Link” it defaults into the title field. My habit is to paste the link itself first.

I’d like to only add a title if it is useful. For my use case I don’t export or do anything with the Title field, so I would prefer to not have to enter it. I usually enter “stuff” or “.” to bypass the required value.
